200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Archer

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

The unit’s attacks ricochet to 1 additional target.

description 4/6

The unit’s attacks ricochet to 2 additional targets. Once in a while, the Conqueror’s damage is increased by 20000 for 5 sec, and the unit’s armor is increased by 200% of their damage for 5 sec.

description 6/6

The unit’s attacks ricochet to 4 additionnal targets. Once in a while, the Conqueror’s damage is increased by 30000 for 5 sec, and the unit’s armor is increased by 350% of their damage for 5 sec. The unit’s attacks steal 10% of the target’s dodge. Once in a while, the unit’s health is increased by 500% of dodge value, the unit’s crit is increased by 300% of dodge value, the unit’s damage is increased by 100% of dodge value. After that, the unit’s dodge is reduced to zero. All effects last for 10 sec.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

When hitting an enemy fighter with a ricochet, the Conqueror has a 33% chance to increase their attack by 10% for 10 sec. Up to 25 effects.

description 4/6

When hitting an enemy fighter with a ricochet, the Conqueror has a 33% chance to increase their attack by 10% for 10 sec. Up to 25 effects. When the health and damage of the Conqueror increases, by the set’s ability, their attack speed increases by 50% for 5 sec.

description 6/6

When hitting an enemy fighter with a ricochet, the Conqueror has a 33% chance to increase their attack by 10% for 10 sec. Up to 25 effects. When the health and damage of the Conqueror increases, by the set’s ability, their attack speed increases by 50% for 5 sec. The Conqueror attacks 2 targets.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

When hitting an enemy fighter with a ricochet, the Conqueror has a 25% chance to steal 10% of the target’s armor for 10 sec. Up to 10 effects.

description 4/6

When hitting an enemy fighter with a ricochet, the Conqueror has a 25% chance to steal 10% of the target’s armor for 10 sec. Up to 10 effects. When the health and damage of the Conqueror increases, by the set ability, the Conqueror begins to restore 50% health from the damage dealt by attacks. The effect lasts for 5 sec.

description 6/6

When hitting an enemy fighter with a ricochet, the Conqueror has a 25% chance to steal 10% of the target’s armor for 10 sec. Up to 10 effects. When the health and damage of the Conqueror increases, by the set ability, the Conqueror begins to restore 50% health from the damage dealt by attacks. The effect lasts for 5 sec. When the Conqueror’s dodge is reduced to zero, the unit’s damage is increased by 50% of crit value, the unit’s physical and magic armor is increased by 75% of crit value. All effects work for 10 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

When an enemy fighter is hit with a ricochet, the Conqueror has a 25% chance to stun them for 2 sec.

description 4/6

When an enemy fighter is hit with a ricochet, the Conqueror has a 25% chance to stun them for 2 sec. When an enemy fighter is hit with a ricochet, the Conqueror has a 25% chance to stun them for 2 sec. For the duration of the battle, the Conqueror’s dodge is increased : - By 10% of the spell power of all living allied mages; - By 15% of the armor of all living allied tanks; - By 20% of the damage of all living allied archers.

description 6/6

When an enemy fighter is hit with a ricochet, the Conqueror has a 25% chance to stun them for 2 sec. For the duration of the battle, the Conqueror’s dodge is increased : -By 10% of the spell power of all living allied mages; -By 15% of the armor of all living allied tanks; -By 20% of the damage of all living allied archers. For the duration of the battle, the Conqueror enhances all allied fighters in a small radius around him, increasing their characteristics depending on his own : - Damage increased by 50%; - Physical and magic armor increased by 100%; - Dodge increased by 75%; - Crit increased by 75%.

Energy Pyramid
Collar
